title: Kommentare: FreeRTOS debugging on STM32 - CPU usage

blog_post.title: FreeRTOS debugging on STM32 - CPU usage

body:
Historische Kommentare aus WordPress, importiert aus dem alten Blog.

**Ursprünglicher Post:** [FreeRTOS debugging on STM32 - CPU usage](https://the78mole.de/freertos-debugging-on-stm32-cpu-usage/)  
**Neuer Post:** [/blog/2020/freertos-debugging-on-stm32-cpu-usage](/blog/2020/freertos-debugging-on-stm32-cpu-usage)

comments.author: Marc Lindahl

replies.author: themole
replies.body:
Hi Marc,

sorry for my late reply and the dealy in accepting your comment. It depends on the project settings in CubeMX, where the weak function gets replaced. In my generated code, it is in ..._it.c. But you are completely right, if you put in in main.c, the extarnal statement would not be necessary. In my opinion, both is quite clean.

Regrads,
Daniel
